svg.title: Dust II ct default sourced-map overlay
svg.desc: Dust II ct default teaching overlay. Either contest Long together or concede it cleanly; keep Mid utility and a B Tunnel listener until a rotation call is real. Five players: Long pair: hold Long / Pit; A anchor: hold Site / Goose; Mid support: deny Xbox / Cat; B anchor: hold Tunnel / Close; Rotator: CT / Short after call. The sourced overview remains the map layer; annotations are editorial and not pixel-perfect.
svg.text: Either contest Long together or concede it cleanly; keep Mid utility and a B Tunnel listener until a rotation call is real.

g.text: Sourced overview: https://www.csgold.net/en/maps/dust2 · local annotations are a teaching overlay, not a replacement radar.
